text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's lunchtime, and excited cheers are ringing out
from the central plaza.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Okey-dokey, Spe, you're up next! There's no way
I'm losing!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Get ready, Urara! I'm going all out!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, challengers. Please take your positions!
And... START!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It looks like they're... arm wrestling?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: U-Urara! You can give up anytime, y'know!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Right back at you, Spe! Your arm's lookin' pretty
shaky!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her bold taunt, Haru Urara's arm is slowly
being forced down.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna lose! Not a chance! I'm not giving
uuu—aaaugh!?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I was sooo close, but I lost again! What can I do
to beat her?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what do you think's the secret to winning in
arm wrestling?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, of course! That's it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
A catchy fighting mantra's just what I need!
Falcon! Toad! Ferret!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay! Hey, Spe! I demand a rematch!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, then I'll make a fighting mantra too! Carrot!
Hamburger! Steak!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If I win, we're eating carrot hamburger steak for
dinner tonight! I can see it on the menu already!
Carrot! Hamburger! Steak!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Falcon! Toad! Ferret! Falcon! Toad! Fer-I-come!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, Haru Urara suffers another defeat.
However...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That mantra got me so hyped! Falcon! Toad!
Ferret!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Urara's taken a liking to the mantra
though, so she's in good spirits.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oooh, I get it! It's just like racing!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: As long as I try my best, I'm sure to win!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Let's go another round, Spe! I'm definitely
gonna win this one! No doubt about it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Sounds good! I won't hold back then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, Haru Urara suffers another defeat.
However...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Urara forced your arm down that low? Incredible!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I was shocked too! I'm looking forward our next
match, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I did pretty good, huh? I'll get you next
time, for sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After giving her all, Haru Urara seems quite
pleased with herself.
